projects.title: AI-Powered Smart Farming Assistant (Group Project)
projects.description: A group-based AI-driven smart farming app with disease detection, crop recommendations, and predictive analytics built using Flutter and Machine Learning.
projects.detailedDescription: AI-Powered Smart Farming Assistant is a cross-platform mobile application developed using Flutter that helps farmers make intelligent decisions using AI and Machine Learning. The app includes features like crop disease detection using CNN models, smart irrigation, fertilizer recommendation, crop recommendation, yield estimation, and market price forecasting using ML models. It integrates external APIs for real-time weather data and environmental insights. Supabase is used for authentication and cloud database management, ensuring secure and scalable data handling. The system follows Clean Architecture principles, making it modular, maintainable, and scalable. Additionally, an AI chatbot provides real-time assistance to farmers in an easy and interactive way. This is a collaborative group project and is currently 90% completed with continuous improvements.
features: Crop disease detection using CNN and image processing
Smart irrigation system using ML models
Fertilizer recommendation based on soil nutrients (N, P, K, pH)
Crop recommendation system using classification models
Crop yield estimation using regression models
Market price forecasting using machine learning
Real-time weather forecasting using external APIs
Secure authentication and cloud storage using Supabase
Clean Architecture for scalable and maintainable development

projects.title: E-Commerce Mobile App
projects.description: A modern e-commerce application with category browsing, smart search, favorites, and cart management using Supabase and Riverpod.
projects.detailedDescription: A scalable e-commerce mobile application built with Flutter that delivers a smooth and interactive shopping experience. The app allows users to browse categories and sub-categories, explore products, perform real-time search with suggestions, and manage favorites and cart seamlessly. It uses Supabase as a backend for real-time database operations and Riverpod for efficient state management. The architecture follows clean separation of concerns, ensuring maintainability and scalability. The UI is designed with a modern approach, including a custom bottom navigation bar and responsive layouts. This project focuses on performance, user experience, and a production-ready structure.
features: Category and sub-category based product browsing
Shopping cart with persistent data storage
Fast data fetching using Supabase backend

projects.title: Finance Management App
projects.description: A secure and user-friendly finance management app with income, expense tracking and data visualization using Flutter.
projects.detailedDescription: A cross-platform finance management application built with Flutter that helps users track their income, expenses, and savings efficiently. The app uses Hive for offline-first local data storage, ensuring fast and secure data access without relying on internet connectivity. It provides categorized transaction management, allowing users to organize their financial activities effectively. Financial insights are visualized using FL Chart, enabling users to understand spending patterns through interactive charts. Riverpod is used for scalable and efficient state management. The app focuses on performance, simplicity, and a clean user interface to deliver a seamless financial tracking experience.
features: Interactive financial charts using FL Chart

projects.title: CardioCare AI - Heart Disease Detection App
projects.description: An AI-powered heart disease risk assessment app with data visualization, health tracking, and secure cloud integration using Flutter.
projects.detailedDescription: CardioCare AI is a cross-platform mobile application built with Flutter that helps users assess their cardiovascular risk through a comprehensive health questionnaire. The app uses a structured risk calculation system based on medical parameters such as age, cholesterol, blood pressure, and chest pain type. It integrates Firebase Authentication for secure user login and Cloud Firestore for real-time cloud data storage, allowing users to persist and access their health records across devices. The application follows Clean Architecture and utilizes BLoC for scalable state management. It features interactive data visualization using charts and progress indicators to present risk levels clearly. The app also includes assessment history tracking, detailed explanations of risk factors, and a user-friendly interface with smooth animations for an enhanced user experience.
features: Heart disease risk assessment using medical parameters
Interactive data visualization with charts and indicators
Real-time cloud storage with Cloud Firestore
Smooth animations and modern UI design

projects.title: To-Do Task Manager
projects.description: A simple and efficient task management app with offline storage and real-time updates using Flutter.
projects.detailedDescription: To-Do Task Manager is a cross-platform mobile application built with Flutter that helps users organize their daily tasks efficiently. The app supports full CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) operations, allowing users to easily manage their tasks. Hive is used for offline-first local data storage, ensuring fast and reliable performance without requiring an internet connection. Riverpod is implemented for scalable and reactive state management, enabling seamless UI updates whenever task data changes. The app features a clean and intuitive user interface designed to enhance productivity and provide a smooth task tracking experience.
features: Full CRUD operations for task management
Real-time UI updates based on task changes

projects.title: Weather Forecast App
projects.description: A real-time weather forecasting app with multi-day predictions and clean UI built using Flutter.
projects.detailedDescription: Weather Forecast App is a cross-platform mobile application developed using Flutter that provides real-time weather updates and multi-day forecasts. The app integrates REST APIs to fetch accurate and up-to-date weather data, ensuring users always have reliable information. It includes features for displaying current weather conditions as well as future forecasts. Riverpod is used for efficient and reactive state management, enabling smooth UI updates based on API responses. The app also uses the intl package for proper date and time formatting. With a clean and user-friendly interface, the app focuses on delivering a seamless and informative weather experience.
features: Real-time weather data integration using REST API
Current weather and multi-day forecast system
Efficient API handling and data parsing
Accurate date and time formatting using intl
Smooth performance and fast data updates
